episodes.title: Justice for a former Exclusive Brethren
episodes.description: When the Exclusive Brethren found out Craig Hoyle was gay, a church doctor put him on drugs to change his sexuality. He's now out of the church, and Dr Mark Craddock has been called to account for the way Craig was treated. (Aired 22 Oct 2010)

episodes.title: Exposing the Exclusive Brethren - Today Tonight
episodes.description: When the Exclusive Brethren found out Craig Hoyle was gay, a church doctor put him on drugs to try and change his sexuality. Jackie Quist from Today Tonight talks to Craig about his experiences, and confronts Dr Mark Craddock. (Aired 08 Mar 2010)

episodes.title: Leaving the Exclusive Brethren - 60 Minutes
episodes.description: 60 Minutes New Zealand interviewed Craig Hoyle about his experiences growing up in the Exclusive Brethren not long after he was excommunicated from the church for being gay. He speaks to Sarah Hall about what it was like to grow up in the sect. (Aired 7 Dec 2009)
